title: The Corridor of Colors in Iceland

scenes.text: This beach boasts black sands and striking basalt columns.
This is Reynisfjara Beach, located on the southern coast of Iceland.
The black sand comes from volcanic minerals, creating a striking landscape.
And the roaring ocean waves create a dramatic setting.
scenes.label: DRAMATIC OCEAN SCENERY

scenes.text: Follow if you love to travel from your screen.

description: 📍 Reynisfjara Beach, Southern Coast - Iceland. A breathtaking beach with black sands and iconic basalt columns, showcasing nature's raw beauty. Follow for daily hidden places! 🌊
